basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Manager, Program Coordinator and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Project Appointment Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. IITD/IRD/142/2026 on the official website of IIT Delhi. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Program Coordinator, Project Manager, and Senior Project Assistant (Tech.).

age_limit.details: Program Coordinator: Minimum 10 years post-Ph.D. research/teaching/industrial experience OR Minimum 15 years of experience for practitioners with 1st class Post Graduate. Project Manager: Minimum 08 years relevant work experience in an Educational Institute/Organisation, out of which at least 05 years at a senior management level. Sr. Project Assistant (Tech.): 05 years of experience in actual conduct of meetings/examinations and/or adequate experience in educational institution or in business organisation of repute. Age Relaxation: 5% relaxation of marks may be granted for SC/ST. For Retired/Superannuated Government Employees, salary will be fixed as per prevailing IRD norms.

qualification.details: Program Coordinator Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with a minimum 10 years teaching/research/Industrial experience after Ph.D OR An outstanding Scientist/Engineer/Technologist/ Practitioner with 1st class Post Graduate in relevant discipline working in Industry and having a minimum of 15 years. Project Manager 1st class M.B.A. in Finance with 1st class preceding degree of B.Tech./M.Tech. in Engg./Sciences with Minimum 08 years relevant work experience in an Educational Institute/Organisation, out of which at least 05 years at a senior management level. Sr. Project Assistant (Tech.) Graduate degree in Commerce with M.B.A. in IT having 05 years of experience in actual conduct of meetings/examinations and/or adequate experience in educational institution or in business organisation of repute. Working knowledge of Digital Marketing, Publication work including News Letters, Social media material & post etc.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consolidated pay ranging from Rs. 47,790 to Rs. 2,16,660 per month plus HRA @ 30%.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your completed application via email is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Appointment at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Project Appointment posts at IIT Delhi. These positions are distributed across different roles like Program Coordinator, Project Manager, and Sr. Project Assistant (Tech.).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it out, and send it to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Appointment posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered is consolidated pay ranging from Rs. 47,790 to Rs. 2,16,660 per month, plus HRA at 30%. Specific salaries vary based on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Program Coordinator post?
faq.answer: For the Program Coordinator post, candidates need a Ph.D. with first class or equivalent at the preceding degree, along with a minimum of 10 years of post-Ph.D. teaching/research/industrial experience, or equivalent experience for practitioners.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention a maximum age limit. However, specific experience requirements are detailed for each post, which indirectly relates to age.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form (Form No. IRD/REC-4) can be downloaded from the IRD Website: http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official email address for submitting applications?
faq.answer: The official email address for submitting applications is [email protected]. Ensure the advertisement number is mentioned in the subject line.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT Delhi offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: While a specific age limit is not detailed, the notification mentions a 5% relaxation of marks for SC/ST candidates. For retired government employees, salary fixation is as per prevailing IRD norms.
